message:
style(web): add content reveal animations and design system tokens

variables.css - New CSS custom properties:
- Add timing function tokens for consistent animation easing
- Add shadow tokens for elevation hierarchy
- Add additional color tokens for UI states
- Support for reduced-motion preferences in timing

skeleton.css - Content reveal animations:
- Add content-reveal-up keyframes: fade + slide up with spring bounce
- Add content-reveal-scale keyframes: fade + scale with overshoot
- Add .content-reveal class for container application
- Add .stagger-children for sequential child animations
- Add delay utilities: .delay-100 through .delay-500
- Add skeleton-crossfade for smooth skeleton-to-content transition
- Add skeleton-fade-out for skeleton exit animation
- Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all animations

index.css:
- Import new style modules
- Organization improvements

action-drawer.css:
- Minor refinements for consistency

reset.css:
- Small baseline adjustments

styles.css:
- Import organization

These animations provide Stripe/Linear-level polish for loading
states, making content appearance feel premium and intentional
rather than jarring.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
